title: D-ale carnavalului
actors: Grigore Vasiliu-Birlic, Alexandru Giugaru, Ion Lucian
plot: Nae Girimea, a hairdresser from a Bucharest brick of the late nineteenth century, finds a new mistress in the person of Didina. This will obscure the mad jealousy of her soul-mistress, Mita Baston, and the violent Pampon, Didina's...
